title: Olaf's Enhanced 3D
description: This resource pack adds 3D models to an array of blocks that traditionally in Minecraft would have been either 2D or rather plain.
body: ``` ``` ![Header Gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c00716e91c9b77bdeae511e0b141749296b5fff.gif) ### This resource pack adds 3D models to an array of blocks that traditionally in Minecraft would have been either 2D or rather plain. If you like this resource pack, please feel free to support me on Ko-Fi :) ## **Every Block Model Upgraded:** - Dripstone - Kelp Block - Hay Block - All Doors - All Trap Doors - All Rails & Variants - Iron Bars - Barrel (Opening Blockstate as well) - Lectern - Chiseled Bookshelf - Bookshelf - Bee Hive - Bee Nest - Ladder - Jukebox - Smoker - Loom - Fletching Table - Sawmill - Chain - Soul Lantern - Lantern - Bamboo Sprout - Mangrove Propogate - Cocoa Beans - Sugar Cane - Vines - Crimson Fungus - Warped Fungus - Red Mushroom - Brown Mushroom - Lily Pad - Crafting Table - Cartography Table - Smithing Table - Furnace - Blast Furnace - Enchanting Table - Scaffolding - Brewing Stand - Ores are 3D - Glow lichen 3D - Redstone dust 3D - Repeaters 3D - Comparaters 3D - Pumpkin stem 3D with leaves - Melon stem 3D with leaves - Jackolatern 3D - Carved pumpkin 3D - Tnt made 3D - Composter made 3D - Sculk shreiker made 3D - Removed ash from unlit camp fire - Added 3D chain to hanging sign (Requires optifine or CEM) ## Every Block Randomized - All Crops (Wheat, Beetroots, Carrots, Potatoes, Netherwart) - All Cross Foliage (Crimson Roots, Grass, Hanging Roots, Large Fern, Nether Sprouts, Seagrass, Tall Grass, Tall Seagrass, Warped Roots) - Lily Pads - 2/5 cactus have a flower - randomized pumpkin & melon stems - randomized bookshelf books - randomized chiseled bookshelf books ## Every Texture Upgraded: - Potatos Have Flowers
